code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
    end
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    in_num = true
    cur = 0
    sign = -1
  else
    if in_num
      nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      cur = 0
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let cnt = list.len(nums)
while j < cnt
  let v = match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let d = v * 2
  if j == 0
    out = "#{d}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{d}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
